ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer or make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Specific model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle body (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "drive_train" TEXT /* Drive train configuration (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of vehicle production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of vehicle production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the engine */,
  "aspiration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aspiration type of the engine */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type used */,
  "cylinder_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cylinder head type */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block configuration */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine specification (e.g., 6 Cyl 3.3L) */,
  "cid" INTEGER /* CID (cubic inch displacement) of the engine */,
  "cc" INTEGER /* CC (cubic centimeter displacement) of the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "bore" REAL /* Bore size of the engine */,
  "stroke" REAL /* Stroke length of the engine */,
  "redline" INTEGER /* Redline (maximum RPM) of the engine */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard of the engine */,
  "engine_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the engine */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of engine production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of engine production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_cylinder_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("cylinder_head_id") REFERENCES cylinder_heads ("cylinder_head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_aspiration_id FOREIGN KEY ("aspiration_id") REFERENCES aspirations ("aspiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aspirations" (
  "aspiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aspiration type */,
  "aspiration_type" TEXT /* Name of the aspiration type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aspiration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cylinder_heads" (
  "cylinder_head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cylinder head type */,
  "head_type" TEXT /* Name of the cylinder head type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cylinder_head_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block type */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Name of the block type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_performance_metrics_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine */,
  "regulation_standard" TEXT /* Name of the regulation standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_compliance_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engine */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_history_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
